# Briu

> Briu is an AI consultancy that helps businesses deploy production-grade agents and workflows at a fraction of the cost of building an internal AI operations team. Founded by Lucas Cairns, Briu offers a calm, high-trust, founder-led approach — from a $5,000 kickoff engagement through full multi-workflow implementations — turning AI ambition into running systems.

## Services

- **Kickoff** ($5,000): Scoping, research, and first production agent delivered in two weeks
- **Workshop Add-on** ($2,500): Team-wide AI briefing and capability mapping
- **Implementation**: Single workflow ($8–20K) or multi-workflow ($20–50K+) buildouts
- **Retainer** (from $500/mo): Ongoing agent maintenance and expansion
- **Speaking**: Keynotes ($5,000) and half-day workshops ($7,500)
- **Nonprofit/Community**: Significant discounts available

## Key Differentiators

- In-house-quality agents at consultancy speed — not a platform, not a plug-in
- Built and launched its own site, brand, and agent stack for ~$711 total
- 22+ interactive data visualizations sourced from podcast transcripts and market data
- Transparent pricing with payment at booking and no pitch calls
- Red-team-tested chat assessment with 0% bypass rate

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://briu.ai/)
- [Build](https://briu.ai/build/)
- [Discovery](https://briu.ai/discovery/)
- [Services](https://briu.ai/services/)
- [Why Now](https://briu.ai/why-now/)
- [Privacy](https://briu.ai/privacy/)

## Tech Stack

- Static HTML/CSS/JS hosted on Cloudflare Pages
- Cloudflare Workers for chat assessment, Stripe checkout, and admin API
- D1 database for analytics and conversation tracking
- GitHub Actions for automated stats aggregation
- No frameworks, no build step — hand-authored throughout

## Contact

- Email: hi@briu.ai
- Site: https://briu.ai
